title: cleidion javanicum var. alongense
intro: Cleidion javanicum var. alongense, also known as the Alongense cleidion or Long-horned cleidion, is a plant species in the family Burseraceae, native to tropical regions of Southeast Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which are attributed to its chemical composition of sesquiterpenes and diterpenes. The health benefits of Cleidion javanicum var. alongense include its potential use in treating various health conditions, such as fever reduction, wound healing, and respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies like infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are traditionally used in folk medicine to harness its therapeutic properties.
